claim.scope: Per-kernel Doppler-shape reference for lm_head_gemv. Computed from the bootstrap input fixture; output values + probe hash recorded so the parity harness can verify backend output element-wise (for tolerance_bounded) or by hash (for algorithm_exact / bit_exact_solo).
claim.notWhat: Not a hardware-captured Doppler reference. Synthesized locally from deterministic numpy reference computation against the same input fixture the canary feeds to backends. Replace with a real Doppler browser/Node WebGPU per-kernel probe when that capture lands.
